meaning: n.[药]巯(基)乙胺,半胱胺(用作金属中毒解毒药、防治放射病药等)
examples: Aim: To know the effect of cysteamine on the pancreatic secretion and enzyme activity in geese.
It demonstrated that cysteamine and engineer vaccine might serve as a potentiator to prevent fowl infection.
The experiment was conducted to examine the effects of cysteamine (CS) on body weight gain and feed conversion rate in sheep.
